summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of KILOM showcase site. All core features working correctly: navigation, scroll effects, interactive sliders, FAQ accordion, contact form, mobile responsive design, and all pages load properly.

issues: Minor console warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position' related to framer-motion - does not affect functionality

navigation.header_links: PASS - Accueil, Fonctionnement, Tarifs, FAQ all working
navigation.scroll_to_sections: PASS - Smooth scroll to sections working
navigation.data_testid_attributes: PASS - All nav elements have proper data-testid

header_effects.transparency_on_scroll: PASS - Header becomes blurred with backdrop-filter on scroll
header_effects.gold_hover_color: PASS - Links change to gold (#F1C086) on hover

hero_section.title_display: PASS - 'Transformez vos déplacements en économies' visible
hero_section.cta_buttons: PASS - 'Commencer gratuitement' and 'Découvrir comment ça marche' buttons visible
hero_section.feature_cards: PASS - Automatisation IA, Conformité fiscale, Économies garanties cards displayed

how_it_works.steps: PASS - All 4 steps displayed (Synchronisation calendrier, Intelligence artificielle, Calcul de distance, Export comptable)

before_after.comparison: PASS - Avant KILOM and Avec KILOM comparison cards displayed with stats (3h/15% vs 5min/0%)

savings_calculator.calculations: PASS - Dynamic calculations update correctly (time saved, yearly amount, ROI)

pricing.plans: PASS - Demo (Gratuit), Solo (89€/an), Duo (139€/an) all displayed

testimonials.testimonials: PASS - 3 testimonials (Marie Dubois, Thomas Lefebvre, Sophie Martin)
testimonials.photos: PASS - Profile photos loading from Unsplash
testimonials.star_ratings: PASS - 5-star ratings displayed (16 filled gold stars total)

faq.accordion: PASS - FAQ questions expand/collapse on click

footer.links: PASS - Produit, Légal, Entreprise sections displayed
footer.social_icons: PASS - LinkedIn, Twitter, Instagram, Email icons visible

contact_page.form_fields: PASS - Nom, Email, Sujet, Message fields present
contact_page.form_submission: PASS - Form submits and shows success message (MOCKED - UI only)
contact_page.contact_info: PASS - Email, phone, address cards displayed

mobile_responsive.hamburger_menu: PASS - Mobile menu button displays on small screens
mobile_responsive.menu_toggle: PASS - Menu opens/closes correctly with X icon
mobile_responsive.mobile_nav_items: PASS - All nav items accessible in mobile menu
mobile_responsive.mobile_cta: PASS - 'Essayer gratuitement' button visible in mobile menu

legal_pages.cgu: PASS - Conditions Générales d'Utilisation page loads
legal_pages.privacy: PASS - Politique de confidentialité page loads

mocked_apis.contact_form: MOCKED - Form submission simulates success after 1.5s delay, no actual backend API call

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features tested and working. This is a static showcase site with no backend APIs. Contact form is UI-only (MOCKED). All sections render correctly on desktop and mobile. Header scroll effects, hover animations, and interactive sliders all functional.
